sourcesContent:
# The void-marker family — a trailing `!` on a function's name at a
# DEFINITION site makes the function void (implicit return suppressed).
# This file carries the def and arrow-assignment forms, where every
# corpus layer holds (sexpr via canonicalized heads
# def!/=!; bytes; tokens via the documented VOID_MARKER mapping).
# Export forms (module syntax) and method keys (pinned
# silently discards them) live in
# test/voidmarker.test.js with the rest of the family surface.
def save!(x)
  register(x)
def tick!
  count = 0
def typed!(x): Number
  bump(x)

# Arrow assignments, both kinds, block and single-line bodies.
logIt! = (m) ->
  emitLog(m)
notify! = (m) => sendOut(m)
flush! = ->
  drain()
chained! = (x) -> track(x)

# A void body may define plain functions; their returns are their own.
nested! = (a) ->
  inner = (b) -> b + 1
  inner(a)

# Chained void definition and an async void def.
alias = wipe! = -> reset()
def store!(u)
  await persist(u)
